status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text);
owl: width: 30px; height: 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
loc-pill: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
search-pill: display: flex; align-items: center; height: 48px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface); padding: 0 18px; gap: 10px;
cat-tile: background: var(--surface); border-radius: 16px; height: 84px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;
photo: width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 3/2; border-radius: 16px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
badge: position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: var(--green); color: #000; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.4px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px;
heart: position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.30); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
dots: position: absolute; bottom: 12px; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 4px;
bubble: width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--empty-bubble); overflow: hidden;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; gap: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
